productDisplayName: Nike Men Green Liteforce Casual Shoes
description: Style NoteCombining the style and flair of canvas shoes with the durability and comfort of running shoes, the nike Liteforce puts the groove back in your style. Every cosmo male's shoe closet needs a high-top sneaker and Liteforce is just the right shoe for this. Product DetailsCanvas upper with synthetic leather overlays and an ankle bandNike swoosh overlay near the midfoot region for added shoe structure Padded collar with a mesh liningFootbed with fabric lining for breathabilityLacing system for all-day comfortPU midsoleHerringbone grooves on the outsole for added traction and absolute gripMaterial and CareTough fabricWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
